records.m_Talk_ENG: There was someone that I wanted to meet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was someone that I wanted to meet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was someone that I wanted to meet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He would appear with light during the climax of any conflict and resolve it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He would appear with light during the climax of any conflict and resolve it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He would appear with light during the climax of any conflict and resolve it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A person who was so radiant and graceful like a swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A person who was so radiant and graceful like a swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A person who was so radiant and graceful like a swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only person who acknowledged me when I was misunderstood by everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only person who acknowledged me when I was misunderstood by everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only person who acknowledged me when I was misunderstood by everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The man</color>...

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The man</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The future of my world has already been robbed, and he no longer exists.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The future of my world has already been robbed, and he no longer exists.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, I still reminisce about the incident I had with the man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, I still reminisce about the incident I had with the man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, I still reminisce about the incident I had with the man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is my old determination.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That is my old determination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That poor child must have felt as much pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... Why are you doing this to me...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why, you ask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why, you ask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why, you ask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because the world has lost its grace. And we need to offer a sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because the world has lost its grace. And we need to offer a sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To put an end to this unholy world, and revert everything to the beginning...

records.m_Talk_FRA: To put an end to this unholy world, and revert everything to the beginning...

records.m_Talk_ENG: An offering to summon an <color=#ffd34c>angel</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: An offering to summon an <color=#ffd34c>angel</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-angel? I don't understand...

records.m_Talk_FRA: A-angel? I don't understand...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, the time has come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, the time has come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, the time has come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Extra, extra! Read all about it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Extra, extra! Read all about it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The western front is winning smoothly with a new weapon that uses Mana Stones! Long live the British Empire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The western front is winning smoothly with a new weapon that uses Mana Stones! Long live the British Empire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The western front is winning smoothly with a new weapon that uses Mana Stones! Long live the British Empire!

records.m_Talk_DEU: The war has caused the price of Mana Stones to rise again! Guess your wages are going to get cut again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The war has caused the price of Mana Stones to rise again! Guess your wages are going to get cut again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Next up! Continuing from last week, another body was found this week!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Next up! Continuing from last week, another body was found this week!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Next up! Continuing from last week, another body was found this week!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be him! This is the doing of the <color=#ffd34c>Midnight Killer</color>!

records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be him! This is the doing of the <color=#ffd34c>Midnight Killer</color>!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm so sorry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm so sorry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm so sorry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even know who I work for?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even know who I work for?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even know who I work for?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Smith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Smith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, so don't be too angry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, so don't be too angry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, so don't be too angry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right? You didn't get hurt, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right? You didn't get hurt, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right? You didn't get hurt, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...U-uh, no.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...U-uh, no.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Get your dirty hands off her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Get your dirty hands off her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Get your dirty hands off her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-eeek! I'm sorry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-eeek! I'm sorry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-eeek! I'm sorry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I said, I'm fine, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I said, I'm fine, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I said, I'm fine, didn't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? R-right! Apologies, miss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? R-right! Apologies, miss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? R-right! Apologies, miss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, dear. Your newspapers are all crumpled. How much is it for the lot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, dear. Your newspapers are all crumpled. How much is it for the lot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, dear. Your newspapers are all crumpled. How much is it for the lot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where have I heard that name before...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where have I heard that name before...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where have I heard that name before...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait! You're Swan Claire? From the Royal Opera House?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait! You're Swan Claire? From the Royal Opera House?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait! You're Swan Claire? From the Royal Opera House?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, that's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, that's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, that's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. This is for your papers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. This is for your papers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. This is for your papers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a ticket. I heard that tickets to Swan's performances can be sold at absurd prices...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a ticket. I heard that tickets to Swan's performances can be sold at absurd prices...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a ticket. I heard that tickets to Swan's performances can be sold at absurd prices...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you sure? I don't know a thing about opera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you sure? I don't know a thing about opera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you sure? I don't know a thing about opera.

HaHa. It doesn
8kt matter.

8kt matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Performances might all be about what you see and hear, but ultimately, it's about what you feel in your heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Performances might all be about what you see and hear, but ultimately, it's about what you feel in your heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Performances might all be about what you see and hear, but ultimately, it's about what you feel in your heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a performance tonight, and I happen to have a spare ticket to give away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a performance tonight, and I happen to have a spare ticket to give away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a performance tonight, and I happen to have a spare ticket to give away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't mind if you sell it to someone else, but... I really hope you come yourself to see me perform.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't mind if you sell it to someone else, but... I really hope you come yourself to see me perform.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't mind if you sell it to someone else, but... I really hope you come yourself to see me perform.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps your bumping into me was meant to be, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps your bumping into me was meant to be, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps your bumping into me was meant to be, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...H-huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...H-huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...H-huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay! I'll be there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay! I'll be there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay! I'll be there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so happy to hear that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so happy to hear that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so happy to hear that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll see you in the audience later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll see you in the audience later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll see you in the audience later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I thought I've seen La Triviata enough times to be sick of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I thought I've seen La Triviata enough times to be sick of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I thought I've seen La Triviata enough times to be sick of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's the same play, however, the entire atmosphere seems to change depending on who plays which role.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's the same play, however, the entire atmosphere seems to change depending on who plays which role.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's the same play, however, the entire atmosphere seems to change depending on who plays which role.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was an astounding performance, madam.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was an astounding performance, madam.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was an astounding performance, madam.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was especially impressed by the one who played the main character Violetta.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was especially impressed by the one who played the main character Violetta.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was especially impressed by the one who played the main character Violetta.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, it should be your first time in this theater, but you have a keen eye, sir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, it should be your first time in this theater, but you have a keen eye, sir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it should be your first time in this theater, but you have a keen eye, sir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The prima donna was played by a child named Swan. She is the most popular actress in all of London right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The prima donna was played by a child named Swan. She is the most popular actress in all of London right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The prima donna was played by a child named Swan. She is the most popular actress in all of London right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prima donna? But she's so young.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prima donna? But she's so young.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prima donna? But she's so young.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Much like her name, I would describe her as a graceful <color=#ffd34c>swan</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Much like her name, I would describe her as a graceful <color=#ffd34c>swan</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Much like her name, I would describe her as a graceful <color=#ffd34c>swan</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can memorize the script and songs after reading them once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can memorize the script and songs after reading them once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can memorize the script and songs after reading them once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And has the vocal range to cover any and all roles from contralto to soprano.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And has the vocal range to cover any and all roles from contralto to soprano.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And has the vocal range to cover any and all roles from contralto to soprano.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even in this opera house with so many talents, her talent is, by far, the best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even in this opera house with so many talents, her talent is, by far, the best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even in this opera house with so many talents, her talent is, by far, the best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The curtain call ends here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The curtain call ends here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The curtain call ends here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ladies and gentlemen, thank you all for coming tonight to see our performance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ladies and gentlemen, thank you all for coming tonight to see our performance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ladies and gentlemen, thank you all for coming tonight to see our performance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will be waiting to see you all again if fate allows it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will be waiting to see you all again if fate allows it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will be waiting to see you all again if fate allows it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Her name is Swan, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Her name is Swan, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Her name is Swan, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, what a befitting name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, what a befitting name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, what a befitting name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Swan. The audience's reactions were so enthusiastic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know that theater sales have nearly tripled since you became a prima donna?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the theater manager is super satisfied.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the theater manager is super satisfied.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the theater manager is super satisfied.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I'm relieved to hear that our audience liked it, Mary Jane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I'm relieved to hear that our audience liked it, Mary Jane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I'm relieved to hear that our audience liked it, Mary Jane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, I was a little nervous on stage tonight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, I was a little nervous on stage tonight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I was a little nervous on stage tonight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just seeing your pile of fan letters could make a book thicker than any famous person's autobiography.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just seeing your pile of fan letters could make a book thicker than any famous person's autobiography.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just seeing your pile of fan letters could make a book thicker than any famous person's autobiography.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I'm so jealous of you. I want to know what it feels like to be loved by everyone in London.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I'm so jealous of you. I want to know what it feels like to be loved by everyone in London.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I'm so jealous of you. I want to know what it feels like to be loved by everyone in London.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not true, Mary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not true, Mary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not true, Mary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, come in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, come in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, come in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, it's that letter again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's that letter again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's that letter again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why it's so creepy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why it's so creepy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why it's so creepy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I have confirmed that the recipient has received the letter, I'll be on my way then.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The prima donna was played by a child named Swan. She is the most popular actress in all of London right now.

root.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I was a little nervous on stage tonight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Stop trying to be so modest. I'm not falling for that again.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just seeing your pile of fan letters could make a book thicker than any famous person's autobiography.

root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I'm so jealous of you. I want to know what it feels like to be loved by everyone in London.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I were as pretty and talented as you, I think I could also confidently go up on stage instead of being behind it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not true, Mary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not true, Mary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not true, Mary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason actors can shine up on stage is because the backstage staff shines the spotlight on them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Actors and staff must work in harmony to give an outstanding performance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The love from fans isn't directed at one person like me, but our entire theater and troupe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you can feel confident about it wherever you go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, you're allowed to be proud. You deserve it, Mary Jane.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the actress who represents our theater company, I'll also stay confident on stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Your eyes always get serious when you start talking about the stage, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's nice to hear a compliment from London's best prima donna.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, come in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, come in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, come in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello. Miss Swan Claire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here's another one. It's a fan letter from an anonymous fan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, it's that letter again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's that letter again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's that letter again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Another one? Who's sending these creepy letters to you?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. The gentleman always sends it without writing down his name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And for us, the Royal Post Office, to provide the best service, it's our policy to deliver letters with the <color=#ffd34c>royal stamp</color> directly to the recipient.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why it's so creepy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why it's so creepy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why it's so creepy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who is mad enough to keep sending a letter with a stamp that costs more than my monthly salary?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Well, that's up to whoever buys our royal stamps. I'm sure he's no ordinary person.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Among the high-ranking people, there are many who have unusual hobbies that we normal folk can't understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, these nobles are the worst.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since I have confirmed that the recipient has received the letter, I'll be on my way then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since I have confirmed that the recipient has received the letter, I'll be on my way then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since I have confirmed that the recipient has received the letter, I'll be on my way then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Goodbye.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Goodbye.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Goodbye.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While the city's all rattled up because of Midnight Killer, shouldn't you report this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: While the city's all rattled up because of Midnight Killer, shouldn't you report this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: While the city's all rattled up because of Midnight Killer, shouldn't you report this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does the letter say, anyway? Can you at least tell me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does the letter say, anyway? Can you at least tell me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does the letter say, anyway? Can you at least tell me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't share it with you because it contains the fan's personal matters...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't share it with you because it contains the fan's personal matters...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't share it with you because it contains the fan's personal matters...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Oh, come on. You're so frustrating in times like these.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Oh, come on. You're so frustrating in times like these.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Oh, come on. You're so frustrating in times like these.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have to worry about me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to worry about me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to worry about me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe that I have to endure this level of attention as an actress.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe that I have to endure this level of attention as an actress.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe that I have to endure this level of attention as an actress.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, whatever. I'm sure you have your reasons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, whatever. I'm sure you have your reasons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, whatever. I'm sure you have your reasons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, promise me that you'll tell me the truth if anything dangerous happens, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, promise me that you'll tell me the truth if anything dangerous happens, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, promise me that you'll tell me the truth if anything dangerous happens, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said, you're the prima donna, the face of our company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said, you're the prima donna, the face of our company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, you're the prima donna, the face of our company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Mary Jane.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Mary Jane.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Mary Jane.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The streets are nearly empty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The streets are nearly empty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The streets are nearly empty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess it should be okay around this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess it should be okay around this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess it should be okay around this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. No one's following me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. No one's following me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. No one's following me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's over. Let's go back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's over. Let's go back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's over. Let's go back.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
With this, this week went by safely
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
With this, this week went by safely
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
With this, this week went by safely
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you know it's dangerous to be out late?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you know it's dangerous to be out late?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you know it's dangerous to be out late?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or do you not realize your own position?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or do you not realize your own position?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or do you not realize your own position?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Who are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Who are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Who are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're Swan Claire, correct?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're Swan Claire, correct?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're Swan Claire, correct?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know who you are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know who you are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know who you are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.
